hook: An AI Dungeon Master that runs a narrative-rich D&D campaign for groups whose human DM canceled.
core_problem: 50M global TTRPG players struggle to schedule a human DM; existing AI alternatives feel like text adventures, not collaborative theater.
ai_leverage: Narrative agent maintains world state + NPC consistency; rules agent enforces 5e/PF2e mechanics; voice agent improvises NPC dialog.
distribution_strategy: Twitch/YouTube actual-play partnerships; r/DnD + community channels.
retention_loop: Per-party world state + character history; switching loses years of campaign continuity.

moat_potential.rationale: Campaign continuity + world state is account-locked; no exporter for competitors.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D&D 5e + PF2e. Stage 2: indie systems + custom worlds. Stage 3: full collaborative storytelling platform with shared IP.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the narrative + rules engines, not a chat UI
commoditization_collapse: lock in via campaign continuity
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for tabletop play; players, GMs, publishers all benefit.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-party world state, character sheets, rule corpus.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Content team reviews any new system added; community mods escalate disputes.

ui_ux_invocation: Party joins a voice room; agent narrates + voices NPCs in real time.

hook: A fan-first secondary ticket marketplace that prices below StubHub by killing scalper bots.
core_problem: $15B/yr secondary ticket market is bot-dominated; fans pay 200-400% markup; artists hate it; venues lose data.
ai_leverage: Bot-detection agent classifies listings and accounts; trust-graph agent maintains fan reputation; pricing agent caps to MSRP+15%.
monetization_logic: 8% buyer fee + 4% seller fee (vs StubHub 15+15%); revenue share with artist for listings on official channel.
distribution_strategy: Artist direct partnerships + venue integrations; community via fan club channels.
retention_loop: Per-fan reputation + artist exclusives drive return; switching forfeits trust score.

moat_potential.rationale: Two-sided trust graph + artist exclusives compound; cold-start barrier.

scalability_rationale: Software marketplace; artist + venue partnerships gate growth.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: indie artists. Stage 2: mid-tier touring. Stage 3: full primary + secondary stack to challenge Ticketmaster.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FTC consumer protection + state ticket resale laws
commoditization_collapse: artist exclusives + bot-kill differentiate from StubHub
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for fans, artists, and venues; everyone wins except scalpers.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Postgres + Stripe Connect + Redis + Cloudflare Bot Mgmt
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Account behavior signals, ticket provenance, artist whitelists.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trust + Safety reviews appeals; artist team approves exclusives.

ui_ux_invocation: Fan searches show; agent surfaces verified-fan listings first; checkout in 60s.

hook: Inventory + community brain for indie bookstores that beats Amazon's discovery, not its price.
core_problem: 12k US indie bookstores compete on curation; existing POS (Square, Lightspeed) is generic; Amazon owns recommendations.
ai_leverage: Curation agent ingests staff picks + community signals; recommendation agent suggests stock + book-club picks per neighborhood.
monetization_logic: $199-499/mo per store; bookshop.org affiliate revenue share.
retention_loop: Per-store curation history + community signals lock; switching loses staff-pick continuity.

moat_potential.rationale: Cross-store curation network compounds; recommendations get smarter as more stores join.

scalability_rationale: Mid-tail market; 12k stores cap; high retention if locked in.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: indie bookstores. Stage 2: indie record + game shops. Stage 3: indie retail OS for curation-driven brick + mortar.
failure_avoidance: commoditization_collapse: own community curation; Amazon can't replicate the local human voice
unsustainable_unit_economics: SaaS + affiliate keep margin healthy
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for indie bookstore survival; we elevate the ecosystem.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Postgres + Square POS API + Goodreads
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-store sales, staff picks, community reviews, regional taste signals.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Store staff approve any auto-reorder >$1k; ABA reviews any aggregated signal published.

ui_ux_invocation: Store owner sees daily picks + reorder suggestions; chat to ask 'what's hot for May'.

hook: A personal AI curator that watches your Netflix + Disney+ + Hulu queue and tells you the one movie tonight.
core_problem: 200M streaming-fatigued households scroll for 18 min/night; existing aggregators (JustWatch) list content but don't decide.
ai_leverage: Taste agent learns from per-platform watch history; mood agent matches recommendation to context (date night, kids, alone).
monetization_logic: $5/mo individual, $9/mo household; affiliate revenue from streaming sign-ups.
distribution_strategy: PLG via 'one-click connect Netflix/Hulu/etc' + word-of-mouth via household share.
retention_loop: Taste model improves with use; household profile lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Cross-platform watch corpus + per-user taste model is unique.

scalability_rationale: API access + per-platform agreements gating; consumer scale is fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: AI curator. Stage 2: cross-household + family co-watch. Stage 3: full entertainment time-management OS.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the cross-platform taste model, not a UI on JustWatch
commoditization_collapse: invisible UX + household share lock
validation_invocation: Cross-platform watch data is asymmetric; competitors with one-platform data are blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Watch history per platform, household member profiles, mood signals.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Privacy officer reviews any data-sharing agreements.

ui_ux_invocation: User says 'pick me something for tonight'; agent returns one option + reason.

hook: Backcountry safety companion that knows when to call SAR before you do.
core_problem: 70M US backcountry hikers face SAR incidents annually; SOS devices (Garmin inReach) are reactive; cell service is absent.
ai_leverage: Edge model on phone + satellite (Apple Emergency SOS) tracks vitals + path deviation; SAR-trigger agent notifies emergency contacts + agencies on threshold.
monetization_logic: $8/mo + free tier with delayed satellite messages.
distribution_strategy: REI + outdoor retail channel; community channels (AllTrails, hiker subreddits).
retention_loop: Trip history + per-route safety baseline lock retention.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-trail incident corpus improves trigger precision; competitors price on generic SOS only.

scalability_rationale: Mobile-first; satellite partnership and SAR coordination gate scaling.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: solo hikers. Stage 2: guided trips + camp ops. Stage 3: outdoor insurance bundle.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: SAR coordination + 911 integration per state
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the edge model + trigger logic
validation_invocation: Defensible safety brand + per-trail data; reject vanity downloads.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + edge ML (Core ML/TFLite) + Postgres
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-trail telemetry, weather, SAR incident history.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + offline-first sync; SAR API integrations.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Safety ops review any auto-SAR call before dispatch.

ui_ux_invocation: Hiker's phone runs silently; emergency contact gets notified if vitals + path deviation crosses threshold.

hook: Marketing copilot for the 80% of indie game devs who can't afford a publisher.
core_problem: 60k indie devs ship to Steam yearly; 95% earn <$10k; marketing spend is the gap, not craft.
ai_leverage: Wishlist-velocity agent watches Steam API; campaign agent generates trailers + posts + influencer pitches; pricing agent times sales.
distribution_strategy: Steam community + indie dev podcasts + GDC; PLG via 'see your wishlist velocity' wedge.
retention_loop: Per-game campaign history + Steam analytics lock.
scalability_rationale: Mid-tail; ARR is healthy via subscription + outcome cut.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: Steam indies. Stage 2: console + mobile. Stage 3: full indie publishing platform.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the campaign data + Steam integration depth
commoditization_collapse: outcome share keeps alignment
validation_invocation: Cross-indie wishlist + conversion data is unique; publishers don't share, devs don't have it.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + Steam Web API + Discord SDK
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-game wishlist velocity, campaign outcomes, influencer engagement.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Dev approves any outbound message; ops reviews any influencer paid ask.

ui_ux_invocation: Dev sees a weekly campaign plan; clicks 'go' on each outreach.

hook: An AI museum guide that talks to you about a Caravaggio like a curator who knows you.
core_problem: 55k global museums hand out generic audio guides; visitors disengage in 12 minutes; museums lack data on what works.
ai_leverage: Voice agent personalizes commentary by visitor history + interest; vision agent identifies the artwork from the phone camera.
distribution_strategy: Direct museum sales + Bloomberg Connects partnership.

moat_potential.rationale: Museum-specific content production + analytics integration deep.

scalability_rationale: Museum sales cycles are 6-12 months; once installed, expansion fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: top-100 museums. Stage 2: cultural institutions globally. Stage 3: full cultural-IP licensing platform.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the museum analytics + content engine
commoditization_collapse: museum lock-in via content + analytics
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for museum engagement; institutions and visitors both win.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + ElevenLabs + custom CV
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-museum artwork corpus, visitor profiles, dwell-time analytics.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Curator approves all generated commentary; legal reviews IP usage.

ui_ux_invocation: Visitor points phone at a painting; agent narrates personally.

hook: A voice-first AI trainer that adapts your workout in real time when you're tired.
core_problem: 180M global gym-goers buy programs they don't follow; existing apps (Future, Peloton) are video-led and rigid.
ai_leverage: Voice agent + wearable telemetry detects fatigue, modifies sets in real time; coaching agent personalizes progression weekly.
distribution_strategy: Corporate wellness + creator partnerships; PLG via free 7-day program.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user fatigue + progression corpus improves coaching.

scalability_rationale: Voice-first scales infinitely; wearable integration depth gates competitors.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: solo trainees. Stage 2: corporate wellness. Stage 3: full physical-health OS bundled with insurance.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own the coaching adaptation + wearable integration
commoditization_collapse: voice + adaptation differentiate from Future/Peloton
validation_invocation: Per-user fatigue + progression data is asymmetric; static-program competitors are blind.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + ElevenLabs + Apple Health/Whoop
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user wearable telemetry, workout history, fatigue signals.
technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS; HIPAA-aligned for corporate wellness.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Certified trainer reviews any program change with injury risk flags.

ui_ux_invocation: User starts a workout; agent voice-coaches; modifies on the fly when wearable shows fatigue.

hook: A hyperlocal event discovery layer that tells you 'go to this open-mic tonight' instead of scrolling Instagram.
core_problem: 200M urban adults under-discover local events; Eventbrite is for organizers, IG is for influencers; the small show is invisible.
ai_leverage: Crawler agent ingests venue calendars + IG + Facebook events; matching agent recommends per user taste + location.
monetization_logic: 10-15% commission on ticket-or-RSVP-driven attendance; free for users.
distribution_strategy: Venue partnerships + community channels per city; PLG via 'tonight near you' SMS.
retention_loop: Per-user attendance history + venue trust lock.
scalability_rationale: Per-metro cold-start; expansion gated by local ops.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: 5 major US metros. Stage 2: top 25 globally. Stage 3: full local commerce + experience platform.
failure_avoidance: unsustainable_unit_economics: marketplace take rate keeps margin healthy
commoditization_collapse: hyperlocal density vs Eventbrite generality
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for local culture; small venues + audiences both win.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-venue calendars, attendance history, taste signals.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Venue ops verify listings; trust + safety review reports.

ui_ux_invocation: User asks 'what's on tonight'; agent suggests 1-3 with venue + time + price.

hook: League ops in a box for the 4M US amateur leagues that still run on Excel.
core_problem: Amateur leagues (soccer, softball, kickball) lose 10+ hrs/wk to scheduling, payments, ref disputes; existing tools (TeamSnap) feel like 2010.
ai_leverage: Schedule agent generates fair rotations; ref-dispute agent triages reports + applies code; payments agent collects + reconciles.

moat_potential.rationale: League operations replaced wholesale; switching is multi-week pain.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: amateur leagues. Stage 2: youth leagues. Stage 3: full grassroots sports platform.
failure_avoidance: commoditization_collapse: own ops, payments, dispute — TeamSnap is messaging-only
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + per-player keeps ARPU healthy
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for grassroots sports; operators and players both win.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-league rosters, schedules, payment history, dispute resolutions.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: League commissioner approves dispute outcomes; ops reviews any chargeback.

ui_ux_invocation: Commissioner gets a weekly digest; clicks 'apply' on agent recommendations.
